answers: Learn Swift, Xcode, UIKit/SwiftUI. Follow Apple Guidelines.
iOS development: learn Swift (Apple's modern language), use Xcode, and choose between UIKit (mature) or SwiftUI (modern, declarative).
iOS dev path: Swift basics → Xcode setup → build a simple app with SwiftUI → follow Apple's Human Interface Guidelines.
Start with Swift on Swift Playgrounds or Hacking with Swift (free). Then build a simple iOS app and publish it to the App Store!
